heading: Wages, supplies, and other working arrangements
label: 1832 Wages, supplies, and other working arrangements
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days from , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 14, 1983section 524 of Pub. L. 97–470section 1801 of this title

children.heading: Payment of wages
children.label: a Payment of wages
children.text: Each farm labor contractor, agricultural employer, and agricultural association which employs any seasonal agricultural worker shall pay the wages owed to such worker when due.

children.heading: Purchase of goods or services by worker
children.label: b Purchase of goods or services by worker
children.text: No farm labor contractor, agricultural employer, or agricultural association shall require any seasonal agricultural worker to purchase any goods or services solely from such farm labor contractor, agricultural employer, or agricultural association.

children.heading: Violation of terms of working arrangement
children.label: c Violation of terms of working arrangement
children.text: No farm labor contractor, agricultural employer, or agricultural association shall, without justification, violate the terms of any working arrangement made by that contractor, employer, or association with any seasonal agricultural worker.
